goal: list_lower_bound(List.cons(head, tail), lower) = forall(x0: S) { List.cons(head, tail).contains(x0) implies lower <= x0 }
proof: function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x1 <= x2 } = list_lower_bound[T0](x0, x1) }[S](List.cons(head, tail), lower)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: List[T0], x2: List[T0], x3: T0) { List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != x2 or x0 != x3 or x3 ∈ x2 }[S](head, tail, List.cons(head, tail), head)
(forall(x0: S) { not x0 ∈ List.cons(head, tail) or lower <= x0 } = true)
function(x0: S) { not (x0 ∈ List.cons(head, tail) and not lower <= x0) }(head)

function(x0: S) { not x0 ∈ tail or lower <= x0 }(w0)
